summary.lv: Swedbank meklē digitālo analītiķi, kurš/-a veidos atskaites un dašbordus, analizēs datus un palīdzēs ieviest digitālās analītikas rīkus, izmantojot JavaScript, Adobe Analytics un BigQuery.
summary.en: Swedbank is looking for a Digital Analyst to build dashboards, dig into data, and help implement digital analytics tools including JavaScript tagging, Adobe Analytics, and BigQuery across digital channels.
